payload:
Work through HYPOTHESES.yml autonomously. Pick the highest-priority open node with satisfied dependencies, run the full experiment cycle, review it,    
  integrate or kill, then immediately pick up the next node once the micro-paper has been completed. When multiple independent nodes are eligible, run them in parallel. BASELINE-FIRST: always check references/ 
  and grounding repos before implementing — build on existing code, especially Qwen3-Coder-Next and Qwen3.5. Never reinvent what exist... [truncated, 581 chars total]

3 parallel priority-10 experiments: (1) skip_list_routing PROVEN — adaptive routing -0.83% vs flat, 64% cost reduction, 72.7% weight at coarsest level. (2) union_find_merging KILLED — similarity not transitive, single-linkage collapses clusters, greedy pairing (behavioral_dedup) is correct abstraction. (3) channel_capacity_bound PROVEN — Shannon model R²=0.944, predicts N_max=13 at 10% gap, consistent with prior N~15 heuristic.

Two experiments need revision, one kill confirmed. (1) skip_list_routing REVISE: fix ensembling confound (add matched-param ensemble control), honest cost framing (training is 4x MORE expensive not cheaper), 72.7% coarsest weight is likely collapse not adaptation, param-match the fixed-depth control, eval on validation set not single sequence. (2) channel_capacity_bound REVISE: 3 params fit to 3 points = zero DOF, R2=0.944 is interpolation not validation. Collect held-out N=3,4,6,7 points, compare against linear/power-law baselines, downgrade from proven to consistent. (3) union_find_merge PROCEED on kill -- integrated as disproven, consecutive_kills=4 (exhaustion warning).

skip_list_routing: REVISED (5 fixes applied, ensemble confound refuted — skip adaptive beats 4x ensemble by -1.51%, routing stats on 20K val tokens, param counts reported, cost claims corrected). channel_capacity_bound: KILLED (held-out N=3,4,6,7 validation R²=-53.2, gap is non-monotonic in N falsifying channel model assumption, all 3 models fail equally). consecutive_kills=5.

skip_list_routing: PROVEN (PROCEED, -0.93% vs flat, 60.6% level-weight concentration, ensemble confound refuted). channel_capacity_bound: KILL confirmed (R²=-53.2, non-monotonic gap falsifies channel model). consecutive_kills reset to 0. 3 new follow-up nodes: composition test, hard inference routing, N-scaling.

3 parallel experiments complete. (1) exp_skip_list_composition_test: PROVEN, composition gap -0.17% (flat +1.04%), level-weight 97.2% above L0 (increases under composition). (2) exp_delta_coding_expert_versions: VALIDATED, SVD rank-2 sweet spot at 41.1% storage with 0.796% max drift. Novel temporal version chain compression. (3) exp_cuckoo_collision_free_routing: PROVEN, +0.15% vs softmax, max chain 0.24, discovered 57.4% softmax collision rate. All 3 PAPER.md files ready for adversarial review.

2 of 3 experiments integrated: exp_delta_coding_expert_versions PROVEN, exp_cuckoo_collision_free_routing PROVEN (reviewer confirmed). exp_skip_list_composition_test needs REVISE with 5 fixes: (1) step asymmetry 600vs500, (2) L3 degeneracy reframing, (3) no-routing ablation, (4) KC2 fix for coarsest collapse, (5) per-seed reporting. 3 new hypothesis nodes generated. FINDINGS.md and VISION.md updated.

exp_gap_as_signal PROVEN: r²=0.74 (threshold 0.3), orthogonal experts (cos≤0.1) achieve +2.1% gap vs joint while correlated (cos≥0.7) show +8.5% — 4x worse. CE gap is strongest predictor. 3 seeds, 21 data points. Novel framing confirmed by 36-source literature survey. exp_gap_signal_macro now unblocked.
exp_gap_as_signal PROVEN (peer-reviewed PROCEED). 3 new nodes: exp_gap_causal_mechanism (p4), exp_gap_n_scaling (p3), exp_gap_practical_regime (p5). exp_gap_signal_macro (p2) unblocked.
